meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Project Stalling
content.seo_description: Stop leaving apps unfinished. Master project management for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To stop the cycle of unfinished projects, you must shift from 'coding mode' to 'product management mode.' By using Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you break massive features into atomic, deployable tasks, ensuring you ship value to your clients every single day.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished side projects is paved with good intentions and broken feature lists. You start with a burst of creative energy, but as the complexity scales, the momentum dies, leaving you with half-finished repositories and a mounting sense of professional dread. It is not a lack of talent that kills your progress; it is a lack of structured orchestration.

Today, we stop the bleeding. We are moving away from chaotic, unstructured coding sessions toward a rigorous, AI-assisted project management framework. By leveraging Antigravity for structural integrity and Claude Code for rapid execution, you will transform from a scattered developer into a high-output machine that ships finished products on deadline, every time.

steps.title: Define the Minimum Viable Product (MVP) Scope
steps.description: Before writing code, define the core functionality. Scope creep is the primary killer of freelancer momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean, 3-feature requirement document for a SaaS MVP. Focus on the core user journey only.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create-task 'Generate a project spec file based on the core user journey.'

steps.title: Architect the Database Schema
steps.description: Solid data architecture prevents refactoring debt later. Use Antigravity to visualize and define your models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a PostgreSQL schema for a user-authenticated SaaS application. Include tables for profiles, subscriptions, and core data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the schema to the database and generate Prisma models.'

steps.title: Build the Atomic Task Pipeline
steps.description: Break the project into 2-hour implementation chunks. This ensures continuous progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break the project requirements into a task list of 2-hour development chunks. Order by dependency.

steps.title: Execute Core Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement one task at a time, keeping the context window clean and the code focused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the boilerplate for the authentication module using Next.js and NextAuth.
steps.claude_code_command: claude execute 'Implement the authentication module with OAuth providers.'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Run tests before marking a task as complete. Never ship code that hasn't been verified by the AI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the authentication module to ensure edge cases are covered.

pro_tips: Never start a coding session without a clear 'Done' criteria defined in your task list.
Use Claude Code to summarize the session at the end of every day to maintain context for the next morning.
If a task takes longer than 4 hours, it is too big; break it down further before writing a single line of code.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation as you build; clients pay more for well-documented codebases.
Commit your code after every successfully completed task to maintain a clean git history for your client.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your workflow to see which tasks took the longest and optimize those specific prompts for your next client engagement.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop stalling and start shipping. Stop guessing and start building with the tools designed for elite freelancers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
